ast.name: innerText
ast.source: You can enter rich text annotations using Markdown just the same way you do in Obsidian.                 Once you are finished editing, the Markdown annotation will be rendered correctly.
ast.target: 你可以像在 Obsidian 中一样使用 Markdown 输入富文本注释。                 编辑完成后，Markdown 注释将被正确渲染。

ast.name: innerText

ast.target: 你可以通过添加如下 Obsidian 链接，直接链接你                 vault 中的笔记，例如

ast.source: Failed to import settings. Please ensure the file is valid.
ast.target: 导入设置失败。请确保文件有效。

ast.source: The file

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: does not exist. Do you want to create it?

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: To add or edit your personal annotations for the installed plugins, go to the
ast.target: 要添加或编辑已安装插件的个人注释，请前往

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: pane and click over the annotation field of the plugin you want to edit.
ast.target: 窗格，并点击你要编辑的插件的注释字段。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If disabled, the annotations cannot be edited from the preference pane and are thus                         protected against accidental changes.  In the
ast.target: 如果禁用，注释将无法在偏好设置窗格中编辑，从而                         受到防止误改的保护。  在

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: pane, you can coveniently change this setting by clicking on the displayed icon
ast.target: 面板，你可以通过点击显示的图标方便地更改此设置

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: which either locks (make non-editable) or unlocks (make editable) your personal annotations.
ast.target: 它会锁定（不可编辑）或解锁（可编辑）你的个人注释。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Create Backup
ast.target: 创建备份

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: With this option enabled, you can select a Markdown file in your vault to                 contain your personal annotations for the installed plugins. This feature is intended                 for power users who prefer to edit annotations directly from a Markdown file.                 A second advantage of this mode is that if you use links to some of your notes in                 the vault, those links will be automatically updated if your notes are later renamed.
ast.target: 启用此选项后，你可以在库中选择一个 Markdown 文件，用于                 存放你对已安装插件的个人注释。此功能面向                 喜欢直接从 Markdown 文件编辑注释的高级用户。                 此模式的第二个优点是，如果你在                 库中使用了指向某些笔记的链接，当这些笔记稍后被重命名时，这些链接会自动更新。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, aclickable icon linking to the plugin's GitHub page will be displayed in the Community plugin pane.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，社区插件面板中将显示一个链接到该插件 GitHub 页面 的 aclickable 图标。
